stage.subtitle_ar: فريقك هو محرّك عملك الحقيقي — هنا تتعلّم لغة القيادة: توظيفًا وتدريبًا واجتماعات تصنع القرار.

content.intro_ar: فريقك هو نصف نجاح عملك، والتوظيف الصحيح يوفّر عليك سنوات من المشاكل. في هذا الدرس ستتعلّم كلمات وعبارات المقابلات الوظيفية بالإنجليزية: كيف تسأل عن الخبرة والمهارات، وكيف تتحدّث عن الراتب وفترة التجربة والعقد. تخيّل أنك تقابل ميكانيكيًا جديدًا لورشتك — هذا الدرس يعطيك اللغة التي تحتاجها.

vocab.meaning_en: to give someone a job
vocab.example: I want to hire a new mechanic for the workshop.

vocab.meaning_en: a person who works for a company or business
vocab.example: A good employee comes to work on time.

vocab.meaning_en: a person who wants to get a job
vocab.example: We have five candidates for this job.

vocab.meaning_en: a meeting where you ask a candidate questions
vocab.example: The interview will be at the workshop on Sunday.

vocab.meaning_en: knowledge and skill from past work
vocab.example: He has ten years of experience with Japanese cars.

vocab.meaning_en: the money a worker gets every month
vocab.example: The salary is 4,500 riyals a month.

vocab.meaning_en: things a person can do well
vocab.example: His electrical skills are very strong.

vocab.meaning_en: a written work agreement between a boss and a worker
vocab.example: We will sign the contract after the trial period.

vocab.meaning_en: a person who can tell you about a worker's past jobs
vocab.example: Can you give me a reference from your last job?

vocab.meaning_en: to ask for a job officially
vocab.example: Eleven people applied for the job in one week.

vocab.meaning_en: a short time to test a new worker before a full contract
vocab.example: We start with a three-month trial period.

paragraphs: Saad owns a busy workshop in the industrial district. Last month, one of his best mechanics moved to another city, so Saad needed to hire a new employee quickly. He wrote a short job advertisement: "Mechanic wanted. Three years of experience with Japanese cars. Good salary. Apply by phone or WhatsApp." In one week, eleven people applied for the job.

Saad chose the five best candidates and invited each one to an interview at the workshop. He did not only ask questions. He also gave each candidate a simple test: check a car that does not start and explain the problem. This test showed him more than any paper. One candidate had excellent skills but asked for a very high salary. Another had little experience but learned fast and asked smart questions.

Before making a decision, Saad called the references of his two favorite candidates. A reference can tell you how a person really works, not just how he talks in an interview. In the end, Saad offered the job to the fast learner. They agreed on a fair salary, a three-month trial period, and then a full contract. Six months later, this new employee has become one of the strongest members of the team.

key_phrases.en: Tell me about your experience with German cars.
key_phrases.ar: حدّثني عن خبرتك مع السيارات الألمانية.

key_phrases.en: How many years have you worked as a mechanic?
The salary is 4,500 riyals, plus a bonus for extra work.
key_phrases.ar: الراتب ٤٥٠٠ ريال، مع مكافأة عن العمل الإضافي.

key_phrases.en: We start with a three-month trial period.
key_phrases.ar: نبدأ بفترة تجربة لمدة ثلاثة أشهر.

key_phrases.en: Can you send me a reference from your last job?
key_phrases.ar: هل يمكنك إرسال تزكية من عملك السابق؟

comprehension.question: Why did Saad need to hire a new employee?
options: One of his mechanics moved to another city
His workshop had too many customers
comprehension.correct: One of his mechanics moved to another city
comprehension.explanation_ar: انتقل أحد أفضل الميكانيكيين لديه إلى مدينة أخرى، فاحتاج إلى موظّف جديد بسرعة.

comprehension.question: What extra step did Saad add to each interview?
options: A practical test on a real car
comprehension.correct: A practical test on a real car
comprehension.explanation_ar: أعطى كل مرشّح اختبارًا عمليًا: فحص سيارة لا تعمل وشرح المشكلة — فالاختبار العملي يُظهر أكثر من أي ورقة.

comprehension.question: What does the reading say a reference can show you?
options: How many jobs the person applied for
comprehension.explanation_ar: التزكية تخبرك كيف يعمل الشخص فعلًا، لا كيف يتحدّث في المقابلة فقط.

comprehension.question: Who got the job in the end?
options: The candidate with the highest salary request
comprehension.explanation_ar: اختار سعد المرشّح الذي يتعلّم بسرعة ويسأل أسئلة ذكية، رغم قلة خبرته.

comprehension.question: What did Saad and the new employee agree on before the full contract?
options: A permanent contract from day one
comprehension.explanation_ar: اتفقا على راتب عادل وفترة تجربة ثلاثة أشهر، ثم عقد كامل بعدها.

task.prompt_en: Write 4–5 interview questions you would ask a new mechanic for your workshop.
task.prompt_ar: اكتب ٤–٥ أسئلة مقابلة تسألها لميكانيكي جديد في ورشتك.
task.guidance_ar: استخدم ٤ كلمات على الأقل من كلمات الدرس، مثل experience وsalary وskills وreference.

content.intro_ar: أنت تعرف الشغل أكثر من أي أحد في ورشتك، لكن قوة المدير الحقيقية أن يجعل فريقه يعمل بمستواه نفسه. في هذا الدرس ستتعلّم كيف تعطي تعليمات واضحة بالإنجليزية، وكيف تدرّب موظفًا جديدًا خطوة بخطوة، وكيف تقدّم ملاحظات تصحّح الخطأ دون أن تكسر حماس العامل.

vocab.meaning_en: clear directions that tell someone how to do a task
vocab.example: Give clear instructions before the work starts.

vocab.meaning_en: the official way to do a task, step by step
vocab.example: We follow the same procedure for every oil change.

vocab.meaning_en: to show someone how to do something by doing it yourself
vocab.example: First, demonstrate the task, then let him try.

vocab.meaning_en: to watch workers and make sure the work is done well
vocab.example: I supervise the new technician during his first month.

vocab.meaning_en: a list of points to check before finishing a job
vocab.example: Use the checklist before you return any car.

vocab.meaning_en: being protected from danger at work
vocab.example: Safety always comes first in the workshop.

vocab.meaning_en: comments that help someone improve their work
vocab.example: Give feedback the same day, not a week later.

vocab.meaning_en: something done in the wrong way
vocab.example: A small mistake with brakes can be dangerous.

vocab.meaning_en: having the duty to make sure something is done well
vocab.example: You are responsible for the final check.

vocab.meaning_en: to teach someone the skills for a job
vocab.example: It takes time to train a good technician.

vocab.meaning_en: one step at a time, in the right order
vocab.example: Explain the procedure step by step.

reading.title_en: Train Them Once, Trust Them for Years
paragraphs: Many business owners believe that giving instructions is simple: you tell people what to do, and they do it. In a real workshop, however, unclear instructions are one of the most expensive problems. A technician who misunderstands one step can damage an engine, lose a customer, or get hurt. That is why strong leaders treat training as an investment, not as lost time.

When you train a new employee, follow a clear procedure. First, demonstrate the task yourself while he watches. Second, do it together and explain each step. Third, let him do it alone while you supervise. Finally, give him honest feedback: name one thing he did well and one thing to improve. This step-by-step method takes extra time at first, but it builds workers you can trust for years.

Two simple tools make this system stronger. The first is a checklist for every common job — oil change, brake service. When a worker follows the checklist, small details are never forgotten, and every car leaves the workshop at the same standard. The second tool is a clear safety rule: anyone who is not sure about a step must stop and ask. A question costs one minute; a serious mistake can cost thousands of riyals.

Finally, remember that people repeat what gets noticed. When a technician follows the procedure exactly, praise him in front of the team. As the owner, you are responsible for the standard of your workshop — and that standard is simply the behavior you accept and the behavior you praise.

key_phrases.en: Let me show you how to do it first.
key_phrases.ar: دعني أوضّح لك طريقة العمل أولًا.

key_phrases.en: Follow the checklist before you close any job.
key_phrases.ar: اتّبع قائمة التحقّق قبل إغلاق أي عمل.

key_phrases.en: Safety first — put your gloves on.
You are responsible for the final check.
Good work. Next time, tighten it a little more.
key_phrases.ar: عمل ممتاز. في المرة القادمة، اربطه أكثر قليلًا.

key_phrases.en: If you are not sure, stop and ask me.
key_phrases.ar: إذا لم تكن متأكدًا، توقّف واسألني.

comprehension.question: According to the reading, why are unclear instructions expensive?
options: A misunderstood step can damage cars or hurt people
comprehension.correct: A misunderstood step can damage cars or hurt people
comprehension.explanation_ar: الفني الذي يفهم خطوة واحدة بشكل خاطئ قد يتلف محركًا أو يخسر عميلًا أو يتعرّض للإصابة.

comprehension.question: What is the FIRST step when training a new employee?
options: Demonstrate the task yourself while he watches
Ask him to watch training videos at home
comprehension.correct: Demonstrate the task yourself while he watches
comprehension.explanation_ar: الخطوة الأولى أن توضّح العمل بنفسك عمليًا بينما يشاهدك الموظف الجديد.

comprehension.question: What is the purpose of a checklist?
options: To make sure small details are never forgotten
comprehension.correct: To make sure small details are never forgotten
comprehension.explanation_ar: عندما يتبع العامل قائمة التحقّق، لا تُنسى التفاصيل الصغيرة، وتخرج كل سيارة بالمستوى نفسه.

comprehension.question: What must a worker do if he is not sure about a step?
options: Wait until the end of the day
comprehension.explanation_ar: قاعدة السلامة واضحة: من لم يتأكد من خطوة يتوقف ويسأل — السؤال يكلّف دقيقة، والخطأ قد يكلّف آلاف الريالات.

comprehension.question: What should you do when a technician follows the procedure exactly?
options: Praise him in front of the team
Give him a harder task the same day
Say nothing so he stays humble
comprehension.correct: Praise him in front of the team
comprehension.explanation_ar: الناس يكرّرون ما يُلاحَظ، فالمدح أمام الفريق يثبّت السلوك الصحيح ويرفع المستوى العام.

task.prompt_en: Choose one job in your workshop (for example, an oil change). Explain it to a new worker step by step, in English.
task.prompt_ar: اختر عملًا واحدًا في ورشتك (مثل تغيير الزيت)، واشرحه لعامل جديد خطوة بخطوة بالإنجليزية.
task.guidance_ar: استخدم First وSecond وFinally في الشرح، وثلاث كلمات على الأقل من كلمات الدرس.

content.intro_ar: الاجتماع الجيد قرارات واضحة في وقت قصير، والاجتماع السيّئ ساعة ضائعة من عمر فريقك. في هذا الدرس ستتعلّم لغة إدارة الاجتماعات بالإنجليزية: كيف تفتتح الاجتماع بجدول أعمال، وكيف تدير النقاش وتوقف المقاطعات بأدب، وكيف تختم بمهام محددة ومواعيد نهائية واضحة.

vocab.meaning_en: a list of points to discuss in a meeting
vocab.example: I send the agenda one day before the meeting.

vocab.meaning_en: to be present at a meeting or event
vocab.example: All supervisors must attend the weekly meeting.

vocab.meaning_en: to talk about a subject seriously
vocab.example: Today we will discuss the delay in spare parts.

vocab.meaning_en: a choice made after thinking or discussion
vocab.example: We need a final decision on the new prices.

vocab.meaning_en: the written record of what was said and decided in a meeting
vocab.example: Ahmed writes the minutes of every meeting.

vocab.meaning_en: the last date or time to finish a task
vocab.example: The deadline for the report is Thursday.

vocab.meaning_en: to repeat the main points in a short way
vocab.example: Let me summarize what we agreed on.

vocab.meaning_en: to stop someone while they are speaking
vocab.example: Please do not interrupt him; let him finish.

vocab.meaning_en: a task that someone agrees to do after a meeting
vocab.example: Every action item needs an owner and a deadline.

vocab.meaning_en: to move something to a later time
vocab.example: We had to postpone the meeting until Sunday.

paragraphs: Every Saturday morning, Fahad holds a team meeting at his car showroom before the doors open. In the past, these meetings were long and tiring: people arrived late, jumped from one subject to another, and left without clear results. Today, the same meeting takes half an hour and produces real decisions. What changed was not the team — it was the way Fahad runs the meeting.

Fahad's system is simple. Before the meeting, he sends a short agenda with three points at most — for example: last week's sales, a delay from a spare-parts supplier, and the new offer for the summer. Everyone who attends knows exactly what the team will discuss. During the meeting, Fahad protects the time: when someone goes off the subject, he says politely, "Good point — let's discuss it after the meeting." And when two people interrupt each other, he stops them and gives each one his turn.

The end of the meeting is the most important part. Fahad summarizes every decision and turns it into an action item with a name and a deadline: "Khalid will call the supplier today. Salem will prepare the summer offer — the deadline is Wednesday." His assistant writes the minutes and sends them to the team the same day. If a point needs more information, Fahad does not let it eat the meeting time; he postpones it to next week with a clear question to answer.

key_phrases.en: Let's start — we have three points on the agenda today.
key_phrases.ar: لنبدأ — لدينا ثلاث نقاط في جدول الأعمال اليوم.

key_phrases.en: What's your opinion on this, Khalid?
key_phrases.ar: ما رأيك في هذا يا خالد؟

key_phrases.en: Good point — let's discuss it after the meeting.
To summarize, we agreed on two decisions.
Salem, this action item is yours. The deadline is Wednesday.
key_phrases.ar: يا سالم، هذه المهمة عليك، والموعد النهائي يوم الأربعاء.

key_phrases.en: Sorry to interrupt, but we are short on time.
key_phrases.ar: عذرًا على المقاطعة، لكن وقتنا ضيّق.

comprehension.question: How were Fahad's meetings in the past?
options: Fun and popular with the team
comprehension.explanation_ar: كانت الاجتماعات طويلة ومرهقة: تأخّر في الحضور، وقفز بين المواضيع، وخروج بلا نتائج واضحة.

comprehension.question: What does Fahad send before every meeting?
options: The minutes of the last meeting
A short agenda with three points at most
comprehension.correct: A short agenda with three points at most
comprehension.explanation_ar: يرسل فهد جدول أعمال قصيرًا بثلاث نقاط كحد أقصى، فيعرف كل من يحضر ما الذي سيُناقش بالضبط.

comprehension.question: What does Fahad say when someone goes off the subject?
options: Good point — let's discuss it after the meeting
comprehension.correct: Good point — let's discuss it after the meeting
comprehension.explanation_ar: يحمي فهد وقت الاجتماع بأدب: يقدّر الفكرة لكنه يؤجّل نقاشها إلى ما بعد الاجتماع.

comprehension.question: What does every action item need?
comprehension.explanation_ar: يحوّل فهد كل قرار إلى مهمة لها مسؤول باسمه وموعد نهائي واضح.

comprehension.question: What happens to a point that needs more information?
options: It is deleted from the agenda forever
It is postponed to next week with a clear question
The team votes on it immediately
comprehension.correct: It is postponed to next week with a clear question
comprehension.explanation_ar: لا يترك فهد النقطة الناقصة تأكل وقت الاجتماع؛ يؤجّلها إلى الأسبوع القادم مع سؤال محدد تجب الإجابة عنه.

task.prompt_en: Write a short agenda (3 points) for your next team meeting, then add one action item with a name and a deadline.
task.prompt_ar: اكتب جدول أعمال قصيرًا (٣ نقاط) لاجتماع فريقك القادم، ثم أضف مهمة واحدة مع اسم المسؤول عنها وموعدها النهائي.
task.guidance_ar: اكتب بالإنجليزية، واستخدم ٣ كلمات على الأقل من كلمات الدرس مثل agenda وdeadline وaction item.
